services.llm_usage_prompt: To use EruditePay BASE: Risk Score, call https://bridge.eruditepay.com/v1/base/address/risk-score with x402 payment of 0.008 USDC. Send json input. Returns json. Description: Risk score (0-100) for a Base address using GoPlus security analysis and heuristics
services.sdk_snippet_python:
import requests
# Call EruditePay BASE: Risk Score
resp = requests.get("https://bridge.eruditepay.com/v1/base/address/risk-score")
# Returns 402 with payment info: 8000 USDC micro-units
